title: Eton Mess Trifle
description: A classic British dessert made with layers of sweet strawberries, creamy whipped cream, and crunchy meringue pieces. Perfect for warm weather and outdoor gatherings.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the Eton mess and strawberries.
2. In a separate bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
3. Fold the whipped cream into the Eton mess mixture until well combined.
4. Spoon a layer of the mixture into individual serving glasses or a large serving dish.
5. Drizzle a tablespoon of sherry or Grand Marnier over the top of each layer.
6. Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of meringue pieces on top.
7. Dust the top of the trifle with granulated sugar.
8. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
9. Just before serving, garnish with additional strawberries and meringue pieces if desired.
